example_da: Jeg kører min bil til arbejde hver dag.
example_en: I drive my car to work every day.

example_da: Vi bor i et stort hus.
example_en: We live in a big house.
The man works at the office.

example_da: Kvinden læser en bog i parken.
example_en: The woman reads a book in the park.
The child plays in the garden.
The food is on the table.

example_da: Han kan godt lide sit arbejde.
Det har været en lang dag.
example_en: It has been a long day.

example_da: Jeg har ikke tid i dag.
Jeg skal mødes med mine venner.
example_en: I am going to meet my friends.

example_da: Kan jeg få et glas vand?
example_en: Can I have a glass of water?

example_da: Jeg har boet her i tre år.
example_en: I have lived here for three years.
We'll see each other next week.

example_da: Jeg skal til lægen i morgen.
example_en: I have to go to the doctor tomorrow.
The shop closes at six o'clock.
We eat dinner at six o'clock.

example_da: Jeg går til sprogskole hver dag.
example_en: I go to language school every day.
I take the bus to work.

example_da: Vi ser en film i aften.
example_en: We are watching a movie tonight.
I read the newspaper every morning.

example_da: Hun skriver en mail til sin chef.
example_en: She writes an email to her boss.
I learn Danish at the language school.
We drink coffee in the morning.

example_da: Jeg bor i en lille lejlighed.
example_en: I live in a small apartment.

example_da: Jeg har købt en ny telefon.
example_en: I have bought a new phone.
The train is faster than the bus.

example_da: Denne jakke er billigere end den anden.
example_en: This jacket is cheaper than the other one.

example_da: Filmen var mere interessant end bogen.
example_en: The movie was more interesting than the book.

example_da: Jeg lærer dansk, fordi jeg bor i Danmark.
example_en: I learn Danish because I live in Denmark.

example_da: Hvis det regner, bliver vi hjemme.
example_en: If it rains, we stay home.

example_da: Når jeg kommer hjem, laver jeg mad.
example_en: When I get home, I make food.

example_da: Da jeg var barn, boede jeg i Odense.
example_en: When I was a child, I lived in Odense.

example_da: Selvom det regnede, gik vi en tur.
example_en: Even though it rained, we went for a walk.

example_da: Jeg læser, mens hun laver mad.
Jeg tror, at han kommer i morgen.
example_en: I think that he is coming tomorrow.
